paper_title: Effects of β-glucan and vitamin products supplementation into diets on growth performance of growing-finishing pigs in Ben Tre province

entities.id: Effects of β-glucan and vitamin products supplementation into diets on growth performance of growing-finishing pigs in Ben Tre province
entities.description: The main research topic investigating feed supplements for pigs.
The primary field of research concerning livestock and nutrition.
The evaluation of weight gain, feed intake, and efficiency in livestock.
Addition of β-glucan (2.0 g/kg feed) into the pig diet to improve growth and immunity.
Addition of vitamin products (4.0 g/kg feed) including A, D3, E, and B-complex into the pig diet.
The standard compound feed used as a control in the experiment.
Experimental setup involving 3 treatments and 4 replications.
Software used for ANOVA and Tukey statistical tests.
Lead author and correspondence from Can Tho University.
Co-author from Can Tho University.
Co-author from Can Tho University.
Co-author from Tra Vinh University.
Co-author from Tra Vinh University.
Co-author from Center of High-tech Application in Agriculture.
Department of Veterinary Medicine, College of Agriculture, Viet Nam.
Academic institution in Viet Nam specializing in climate change and aquaculture.

entities.id: Center of High-tech Application in Agriculture, Ben Tre province
entities.description: Provincial high-tech agricultural research center in Viet Nam.
Starting weight of the post-weaned piglets.
Average weight of pigs in experimental groups after 8 weeks.
Increase in economic profit compared to the control group.
Significant improvement in Feed Conversion Ratio.
